name: Westchester Acacia Wood Side Table - Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Water-Resistant Square Patio End Table, 20"x15.75"
description:
Accentuate your backyard or patio space with a functional accessory that enhances any seating ensemble with style and charm. Our accent side table features a durable acacia wood structure and sturdy sled legs to enhance the way you utilize your outdoor space. With a soothing rustic look, this accessory can be used to complement any patio or backyard space. Whether you are placing a chilled drink next to your lounge space or snacking on a plate of refreshments, our side table has you covered.

RUSTIC DESIGN: Match your decor to this rustic style table that brings a rugged, natural beauty to your outdoor space. Including nature-inspired textures and earthy wood materials, our table provides simple yet outstanding design and comfort for all to enjoy.

ACACIA WOOD: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands outdoor elements and will not darken over time. Acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

SLAT DESIGN WITH SLED LEGS: The top of this side table features beautifully slat paneling, giving this set a sophisticated, classic look. This perfectly complements the simple yet effective sled leg design.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This side table is 20.00” W x 20.00” D x 15.75” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this side table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
